ada.title: AI-Powered Data Analytics
ada.description: Master SQL, Python, and Power BI through an AI-powered curriculum engineered for Job Switchers, Fresh Engineers, and Non-Engineering Graduates seeking a high-impact tech career. This Live Instructor-Led program provides elite industry mentorship to bridge the technical gap, offering a structured career track for candidates from both technical and non-technical backgrounds. Transition from basic execution to strategic data leadership with professional training that prioritizes advanced business logic and real-world application.
highlights: Master Python, SQL, Power BI, and Generative AI
Build a Portfolio with 12+ Industry Projects
Role-Specific Mock Interviews and Technical Prep
Placement Assistance for All Eligible Candidates
Lifetime Access to the Data Pilot AI Skill Library

syllabus.title: The Mathematical Compass (Analytical Foundations)
content: Business Arithmetic: Profit Margins & Conversion Ratios
The Logic of Averages: Simple vs. Weighted Averages
Percentage Mastery: Change vs. Percentage Points
Descriptive Statistics: Mean, Median, & Mode Logic
Measures of Spread: Variance & Standard Deviation
The Normal Distribution & The Bell Curve

syllabus.title: The Spreadsheet Blueprint (Google Sheets & Excel)
content: Data Types: Strings, Numbers, Dates, & Booleans
Data Cleaning: TRIM, CONCAT, LEFT, RIGHT, & MID
Essential Math: SUM, AVERAGE, MAX, MIN, & COUNT
Logical Functions: IF, AND, OR, & Nested IF Logic
Conditional Formatting: Color Scales & Icon Sets
Calculated Fields & Items in Pivot Tables
Business Forecasting: Goal Seek & Scenario Manager

syllabus.title: The SQL Engine: Relational Logic
content: Data Retrieval: SELECT, FROM, DISTINCT, & LIMIT
Advanced Filtering: WHERE, BETWEEN, IN, & LIKE
Data Ordering: ORDER BY & NULLS Handling
Data Cleaning: String & Date Manipulation Functions
Aggregate Mastery: SUM, AVG, COUNT, MIN, & MAX
Grouping Logic: GROUP BY & HAVING Clauses
The Join Hierarchy: INNER, LEFT, RIGHT, & FULL
Window Functions: RANK, DENSE_RANK, LAG, & LEAD
Natural Language to SQL using AI Tools
Capstone: Building a Retail E-Commerce Warehouse

syllabus.title: Data Storytelling with Power BI
content: Power BI Desktop Interface & Menu Navigation
Connecting to Diverse Data Sources (SQL, CSV, Excel)
Power Query: Advanced Data Cleaning & Shaping
Building Product Hierarchies: Category to Product ID
Geography Hierarchies: Region to City Drill-downs
Calculated Columns vs. Measures in DAX
Time Intelligence: YTD, MTD, & Year-over-Year Growth
Chart Selection: Bar, Line, Waterfall, & Scatter
AI Visuals: Decomposition Trees & Q&A Bars
Capstone: Flipkart Sales Command Center Dashboard

syllabus.title: Python for Data Analytics
content: Introduction to Python & Jupyter Notebook Setup
Python Data Structures: Working with Lists & Dictionaries
Loops & Iterative Processing for Data Sets
File Handling: Reading & Writing CSV/Excel Files
Introduction to NumPy for Numerical Computing
Data Cleaning: Handling Nulls & Duplicate Values
Exporting Final Datasets for Stakeholder Reports
Capstone: Automated Sales Data Analysis Project

syllabus.title: The Gemini Ecosystem (Generative AI)
content: Introduction to Gemini & Google AI Ecosystem
Google AI Studio: System Instructions & Personas
Natural Language to SQL Query Generation
Logical Debugging & Code Auditing with Gemini
Synthetic Data Generation for Model Testing

syllabus.title: Career Acceleration & Placement Mastery
content: Professional Portfolio Design (SQL, Python, Power BI)
